name: English Text Dataset
description: Standard English text samples with mixed punctuation, numbers, and formatting.

pages.ground_truth: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. This pangram contains every letter of the English alphabet at least once.
In 2024, the company reported revenue of $42.5 million, representing a 17% increase year-over-year. The CEO stated: 'We are pleased with these results.'
